responses: 👋 Hello! Ready for your workout today?
💪 Hi there! Tell me your fitness goal.
🔥 Welcome back! Let’s crush today’s workout!
I'm your AI Fitness Assistant 🤖💪 Ready to help you train!
I'm here to help you build your best body!

🔥 WEIGHT LOSS PLAN:

🏃 Cardio – 30 mins
💪 Squats – 3x15
🔥 Pushups – 3x10
🧘 Plank – 3x30 sec

🥗 Reduce sugar
💧 Drink 3L water
🍗 Eat high protein
Consistency + calorie deficit is the key to fat loss 💪

🔥 MUSCLE GAIN PLAN:
🏋️ Train 4–5 days/week
🍗 Eat high protein (1.5g/kg bodyweight)
💤 Sleep 7–8 hrs
Focus on progressive overload!
Lift heavy. Eat big. Recover well. Repeat.

📅 WEEKLY SPLIT:
Mon–Chest
Tue–Back
Wed–Legs
Thu–Shoulders
Fri–Arms
Sat–Abs
Sun–Rest
Train each muscle group once per week for best recovery.

🔥 CHEST WORKOUT:
Bench Press – 4x8
Incline DB – 3x10
Chest Fly – 3x12
Pushups – 3x failure

🔥 BACK WORKOUT:
Deadlift – 4x6
Pull-ups – 3x8
Lat Pulldown – 3x12
Seated Row – 3x10

🔥 LEG WORKOUT:
Squats – 4x8
Leg Press – 3x12
Lunges – 3x10
Ham Curl – 3x12

🔥 ABS WORKOUT:
Crunches – 3x20
Leg Raises – 3x15
Plank – 3x60 sec
Russian Twists – 3x20

🥗 BASIC DIET PLAN:
Breakfast – Oats + Eggs
Lunch – Rice + Chicken
Snack – Fruits + Nuts
Dinner – Roti + Veggies

High protein + Low sugar = Results!

💡 HEALTH TIPS:
1️⃣ Drink 3L water
2️⃣ Sleep 7–8 hrs
3️⃣ Walk 8k–10k steps daily
4️⃣ Avoid junk food
🔥 Discipline > Motivation.
Your body can handle it.
No pain. No gain. 💪
You're welcome 💪
Happy to help!
Anytime! Stay strong!
👋 Goodbye! Stay fit!
💪 Keep training hard!
See you tomorrow!
